wins: Revenue of $35.1 billion, up 17% sequentially and 94% year-on-year
NVIDIA H200 sales increased significantly to double-digit billions
NVIDIA H200-powered cloud instances available from AWS, CoreWeave, and Microsoft Azure
NVIDIA AI Enterprise full year revenue expected to increase over 2x from last year

risks: Gross margins expected to moderate to the low 70s as Blackwell ramps
